title: Add workspace/tab fixture data to FakeHerdr for demo-mode grouping parity
action: FakeHerdr::new() (src/herdr/fake.rs) seeds 4 demo agents across workspace_ids w1 and w2 (via the agent() helper, which also derives tab_id as "{workspace}:t"), but the Snapshot it constructs only sets `agents` and leaves `workspaces`/`tabs` at their Default::default() (empty vecs) - confirmed live that this makes GET /api/agents return workspace_label:"" and workspace_status:"unknown" for every row in --demo mode, so the switcher's grouped sections (2 distinct workspaces exist among the fake agents) show a blank header and an Unknown badge. Add workspaces: vec![Workspace{workspace_id:"w1", label:"frontend-app", agent_status: AgentStatus::Working}, Workspace{workspace_id:"w2", label:"docs-site", agent_status: AgentStatus::Done}] and tabs: vec![Tab{tab_id:"w1:t", label:"main"}, Tab{tab_id:"w2:t", label:"main"}] to the Snapshot constructed in FakeHerdr::new(), replacing the ..Default::default() spread for those two fields specifically (keep it if Snapshot has other fields still needing defaults). w1's rollup status is Working because it has a working agent seeded; w2's is Done because its two seeded agents are done/idle, neither working nor blocked. These are fixture values only (not a real herdr behavior claim) - do not change wire.rs, api.rs, or any non-fixture file.

truths: In --demo mode, GET /api/agents returns a non-empty workspace_label ("frontend-app" for w1 rows, "docs-site" for w2 rows) and a workspace_status other than "unknown" for every row

Existing FakeHerdr-based tests (src/herdr/fake.rs's own #[cfg(test)] module and any other test using FakeHerdr::new()) still pass unchanged - this is additive fixture data, not a behavior change to any existing assertion

artifacts.substantive: FakeHerdr::new()'s Snapshot includes workspaces and tabs vecs matching the existing w1/w2 agent seed data, no TODO

prohibitions: Do not modify src/herdr/wire.rs, src/web/api.rs, web/src/api.ts, or any switcher.ts/styles.css file
Do not change the existing 4 seeded agents' fields (pane_id, kind, status, title)
Do not remove the ..Default::default() spread if Snapshot has other fields beyond agents/workspaces/tabs that still need it

trace.outcome: Added fixture workspaces (frontend-app, docs-site) and tabs (main) to FakeHerdr::new() snapshot for --demo mode grouping parity
